'''chonachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ejidal|ejidal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-n-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ejidal|ejidal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chonachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chonachithi|chonachithi]] || [[word:chonachiji|chonachiji]] || [[word:chonachishi|chonachishi]] || [[word:chonachiki|chonachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chonachuthuthu|chonachuthuthu]] || [[word:chonachujuju|chonachujuju]] || [[word:chonachushushu|chonachushushu]] || [[word:chonachukuku|chonachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chonachuthu|chonachuthu]] || [[word:chonachuju|chonachuju]] || [[word:chonachushu|chonachushu]] || [[word:chonachuku|chonachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chonachufthuf|chonachufthuf]] || [[word:chonachufjuf|chonachufjuf]] || [[word:chonachufshuf|chonachufshuf]] || [[word:chonachufkuf|chonachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chonachethe|chonachethe]] || [[word:chonacheje|chonacheje]] || [[word:chonacheshe|chonacheshe]] || [[word:chonacheke|chonacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chonachothotho|chonachothotho]] || [[word:chonachojojo|chonachojojo]] || [[word:chonachoshosho|chonachoshosho]] || [[word:chonachokoko|chonachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chonachotho|chonachotho]] || [[word:chonachojo|chonachojo]] || [[word:chonachosho|chonachosho]] || [[word:chonachoko|chonachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chonachofthof|chonachofthof]] || [[word:chonachofjof|chonachofjof]] || [[word:chonachofshof|chonachofshof]] || [[word:chonachofkof|chonachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chonachĂŻfthĂŻf|chonachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chonachĂŻfjĂŻf|chonachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chonachĂŻfshĂŻf|chonachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chonachĂŻfkĂŻf|chonachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chonachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|chonachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chonachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|chonachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chonachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|chonachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chonachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|chonachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chonachĂŻfthĂŻf|chonachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chonachĂŻfjĂŻf|chonachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chonachĂŻfshĂŻf|chonachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chonachĂŻfkĂŻf|chonachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chonachĂŻfthĂŻf|chonachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chonachĂŻfjĂŻf|chonachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chonachĂŻfshĂŻf|chonachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chonachĂŻfkĂŻf|chonachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chonachĂŠthĂŠ|chonachĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:chonachĂŠjĂŠ|chonachĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:chonachĂŠshĂŠ|chonachĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:chonachĂŠkĂŠ|chonachĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chonachathatha|chonachathatha]] || [[word:chonachajaja|chonachajaja]] || [[word:chonachashasha|chonachashasha]] || [[word:chonachakaka|chonachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chonachatha|chonachatha]] || [[word:chonachaja|chonachaja]] || [[word:chonachasha|chonachasha]] || [[word:chonachaka|chonachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chonachafthaf|chonachafthaf]] || [[word:chonachafjaf|chonachafjaf]] || [[word:chonachafshaf|chonachafshaf]] || [[word:chonachafkaf|chonachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:chonachasha|chonachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:chonachshĂ«asha|chonachshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chonachroasha|chonachroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chonachmuasha|chonachmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:chonachyaasha|chonachyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochonachnkshĂ«asha|gochonachnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochonachnkroasha|gochonachnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochonachnkmuasha|gochonachnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochonachnkyaasha|gochonachnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:chonanachasha|chonanachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chonanachshĂ«asha|chonanachshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chonanachroasha|chonanachroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chonanachmuasha|chonanachmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chonanachyaasha|chonanachyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochonanachnkshĂ«asha|gochonanachnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochonanachnkroasha|gochonanachnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochonanachnkmuasha|gochonanachnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochonanachnkyaasha|gochonanachnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:chenĂŠchasha|chenĂŠchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chenĂŠchshĂ«asha|chenĂŠchshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chenĂŠchroasha|chenĂŠchroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chenĂŠchmuasha|chenĂŠchmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chenĂŠchyaasha|chenĂŠchyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochenĂŠchnkshĂ«asha|gochenĂŠchnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochenĂŠchnkroasha|gochenĂŠchnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochenĂŠchnkmuasha|gochenĂŠchnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochenĂŠchnkyaasha|gochenĂŠchnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:chonfachasha|chonfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chonfachshĂ«asha|chonfachshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chonfachroasha|chonfachroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chonfachmuasha|chonfachmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chonfachyaasha|chonfachyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochonfachnkshĂ«asha|gochonfachnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochonfachnkroasha|gochonfachnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochonfachnkmuasha|gochonfachnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochonfachnkyaasha|gochonfachnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
